currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; then rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper with copper/silver/gold each 0-9.

daily_choice_pools.json.rule: Shared choice pools are optional and should not duplicate person-specific tasks already loaded.

currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; then rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper with copper/silver/gold each 0-9.

records.title: STOP skill micro-pause
records.why_it_exists: Creates space before spiraling, shutdown, snapping, or people-pleasing.
tiny_steps: Proceed with the safest tiny step.

records.title: TIPP or body reset, low-spoon version
records.why_it_exists: Gives panic, anger, shame, or overwhelm a body-based off-ramp.
tiny_steps: Cool cloth or temperature shift if safe.

records.title: Tiny diary card
records.why_it_exists: Tracks patterns without turning the day into homework.
tiny_steps: Pick one rating: mood, pain, energy, or stress.
Mark one skill used or one support needed.

records.title: One Next Step ADHD launch
records.why_it_exists: Reduces task paralysis by making starting smaller than finishing.
tiny_steps: Do only the first visible step.

records.title: Body-double or timer bridge
records.why_it_exists: Helps time blindness and starting friction without punishment.
tiny_steps: Work near another person, bot, music, or visual cue for 5-10 minutes.

records.title: Shared kindness check-in
records.why_it_exists: Keeps the shared space collaborative instead of chore-only.

currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; then rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper with copper/silver/gold each 0-9.

records.title: Routine and reward review
records.why_it_exists: Keeps rewards motivating and tasks realistic.
tiny_steps: Raise reward for avoided care tasks.

records.title: DBT/ADHD skills menu refresh
records.why_it_exists: Keeps the skill list usable, not bloated.

records.title: Medical/admin buffer review
records.why_it_exists: Prevents refill, form, and appointment cliffs.

currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; then rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper with copper/silver/gold each 0-9.

records.title: One-event Chain Analysis
records.why_it_exists: Looks at one hard moment without blame.
tiny_steps: Find one place to add support next time.

records.title: DEAR MAN request script
records.why_it_exists: Makes asking, boundaries, or appointments less overwhelming.

records.title: Opposite Action tiny plan
records.why_it_exists: Gives depression, avoidance, shame, or anger one safer alternative.

records.title: ADHD friction audit
records.why_it_exists: Finds the barrier instead of blaming the person.
tiny_steps: Add one tool, cue, shortcut, or body-double option.

currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; then rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper with copper/silver/gold each 0-9.

records.title: Disability profile update
records.why_it_exists: Updates supports when bodies, homes, meds, or capacity change.

records.title: Emergency and support info review
records.why_it_exists: Keeps crisis and medical information from going stale.
tiny_steps: Review what helpers should do first.

records.title: OurSpace task-system cleanup
records.why_it_exists: Prevents the app from becoming a guilt pile.

clock_model.start_time: runtime timestamp captured when button is pressed
clock_model.reason: With disability, ADHD, chronic illness, and caregiver burnout, days do not start at the same clock time and do not need to line up between users.

adaptive_modes.survival_day: Load only critical body care, medication/medical supports, food, hydration, cats, and one regulation skill.
adaptive_modes.standard_day: Load the schedule template exactly as written, plus at most one optional choice-pool item every few hours.
adaptive_modes.expanded_day: Allow weekly/monthly items to be inserted into empty or optional blocks, still capped at two items per hour.

records.aisle: Cannabis - Massachusetts Legal Adult / Medical Card Aisle
records.notes: Massachusetts adult-use cannabis is 21+ and requires government-issued ID at licensed retailers. Massachusetts guidance lists up to 2 ounces carried and up to 10 ounces at home. Jasper was born in 1999 and William was born in 1992, so both are over 21 in 2026. Use only where legal, follow medical-card and dispensary rules, and do not drive or do unsafe tasks while impaired.
